reviews.review_description: As a member of the Rounders, I will update the review score if more cases are added to solve. The game is fun, but very very short.

developer_response.body:
Welcome to the Rounders!
We're so glad you've enjoyed this adventure!

Thank you for those 2 stars for the Doctor Zuengo Development Fund. We hope to receive more contributions from new players soon so we can continue to publish new cases ;)

Please do not hesitate to tell us anything you find interesting about your experience as a player so that we can continue to improve!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this solid but short escape room experience with such cute voxel art. What I liked the most is that almost everything is interactive, something difficult to find in current VR games. More than a game, an enjoyable experience!!
